title: How did Rei get injured the first time Shinji met her
display_title: How did Rei get injured the first time Shinji met her
wikitext:
[]: How did Rei get injured the first time Shinji met her?             Quote Post by QuantumPete » Sun Jul 10, 2005 4:44 pm Hey, folks. I just watched the Evangelion series for the first time (Perfect Collection rather than Platinum version), and this thought just popped into my cranium... At the beginning of the series, if my memory is correct, an Angel attacks for the first time in over ten years or so. Shinji ends up choosing to fight this Angel because the only other pilot, Rei, is horribly injured and weak -- presumably from combat. However, how did Rei get injured if there were no Angels around to fight, since the one Shinji fights is the first one that's appeared for over a decade? Did I get something mixed up?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 10, 2005 4:49 pm She was banged up like hell during the EVA-00 synchro test, shortly before Sachiel (Third Angel) attacked. See: flashback at beginning of episode #05.

[]:             Quote Post by QuantumPete » Sun Jul 10, 2005 8:08 pm Thanks for the info, Reichu! I had forgotten that she got injured. Only remembered that the EVA tried to attack Shinji's dad behind the glass. By the way, is your icon/avatar photo at left a picture of an EVA without the armor on? If so, where did it come from? Is it a photo of a model that was sold? Thanks again!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Jul 10, 2005 8:17 pm Yes Reichu why don't you show the new guy the full picture? >sits and waits for the reaction<

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jul 10, 2005 8:20 pm Gendo shot her. Say, Reichu, whatever happened to the pics of the Santa-Barb and Nao-chan sculpture... thing? I can't find them anywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 10, 2005 9:03 pm That's because Monkey made me delete all of the crap I had on his server. I'll ... throw something together. Pete: Yep, it's EVA-03 without armor or any technological modifications. From a sculpture I made. When I get a makeshift presentation page onto my new server, I'll post a link for you.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Jul 10, 2005 11:13 pm QuantumPete wrote: Thanks for the info, Reichu! I had forgotten that she got injured. Only remembered that the EVA tried to attack Shinji's dad behind the glass.

[]:             Quote Post by Oblivious » Sun Jul 10, 2005 11:48 pm [bullshit] Oh it's simple. Rei was actually out doing some covert shopping for Gendo. Shinji saw her while she was out so she had to hide quick. Remember how she disappears without a trace? Then Misato sees Rei and decides to give her a hand, but she couldn't let Shinji see Rei so she puts Rei in the trunk. Rei gets injured because of Misato's impeccable driving skills. Not to mention the car being hit by the blastwave of that N^2 bomb. [/bullshit] In the manga she was piloting Unit 01 against Sachiel before Shinji came along. She got trashed. She soooo would have been a much better pilot if Gendo cared for developing her personality. I guess that was not 'required' though.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 11, 2005 7:05 pm i fail to see how personality has anything to do with the evangelion piloting, unless you are referring to something like the drive to succeed

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jul 11, 2005 7:44 pm Well, Rei did bring Gendou's glasses with her into the entry plug during her first sucessful synch with Unit-00, which would indicate that her relationship with him did have an effect on her ability to pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 11, 2005 7:48 pm I think this thread has lived its time and should now be closed.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 11, 2005 8:48 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Well, Rei did bring Gendou's glasses with her into the entry plug during her first sucessful synch with Unit-00, which would indicate that her relationship with him did have an effect on her ability to pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Jul 12, 2005 8:35 am that's because she has Shinji now.......then...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Sep 27, 2005 2:05 pm This has probably been brought up before but- Rei's injuries. episode 01: Eye / Arm Unit-01 injuries. episode 02 : Eye / Arm They both recieve damage in the same areas... Why is this?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 27, 2005 2:58 pm You have to read the Mogudon doujinshi to find out what REALLY happened to Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by wrack » Tue Sep 27, 2005 4:33 pm Zugzwang wrote: Rei's injuries. episode 01: Eye / Arm Unit-01 injuries. episode 02 : Eye / Arm They both recieve damage in the same areas...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Sep 29, 2005 10:31 am Hmmm. Maybe its just to expose the fact (a little more) that the Children are connected with the Eva(s) in more ways than one? In other words. I have no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Sep 29, 2005 11:24 am Arm and eye injuries seem to be the order of the day in Evangelion for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 29, 2005 2:50 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You have to read the Mogudon doujinshi to find out what REALLY happened to Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Thu Sep 29, 2005 4:28 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: You have to read the Mogudon doujinshi to find out what REALLY happened to Rei.
